description_long: A rectangular teal container is filled to the brim with plump, round blueberries, some of which have a faint whitish bloom on their skin. The blueberries vary slightly in size and shade, ranging from deep blue to bluish-gray, and a few have rolled out of the container, resting nearby. The container itself has gently sloped sides and a smooth, matte finish, suggesting it is made of plastic or a similar material. Each blueberry displays a small, star-shaped calyx at its apex, adding a subtle texture to their otherwise smooth surfaces. The overall arrangement is dense, with the berries closely packed together, creating a sense of abundance. No stems or leaves are visible, and the focus is on the fruit and its receptacle.
description: A teal rectangular container filled with plump, bluish-gray blueberries, some spilling out, each with a star-shaped calyx and a powdery bloom.
description_view_0: Front view shows the teal container densely packed with blueberries, all contained within the box.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a few blueberries have rolled out of the container, resting on the surface beside it.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights two blueberries lying in front of the container, with the rest still inside.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows three blueberries outside the container, emphasizing the overflow.
attribute_cluster_arrangement: Blueberries are densely clustered together inside the container, with a few individual berries scattered outside, appearing as a compact group.
attribute_calyx_shape: Small, star-shaped calyx with 5-6 short lobes, slightly indented at the blossom end of each berry.
